name: One-skillet: Life of the Party Fajitas
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------------GUACAMOLE---------------------------------
1. Mash together 1 avocado and 1 tablespoon lemon juice.
Add 1 teaspoon minced garlic and a dash of Worcestershire sauce.
Adjust with cayenne pepper to taste.
1. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add chicken to the
skillet and sprinkle seasonings. Stir-fry for 4 minutes until cooked
and slightly golden brown. Set aside and keep warm. Save half the
chicken for later in the week.
2. Slice vegetables (red onion and sweet pepper) and add to the
skillet with garlic. Stir-fry for 3 minutes until tender.
3. Return half the chicken to the skillet. Combine a drop of tabasco
sauce and lemon juice, then drizzle over the chicken. Heat through.
4. Microwave tortillas on high for 1 minute. Spoon fajita mixture onto
each tortilla, roll up, and serve garnished with sour cream,
salsa, and guacamole.
